1643644.name: Alicia Florez
1643644.injDetail: Florez (neck) is listed as questionable for Sunday's game against the Storm.

1642800.name: Aneesah Morrow
1642800.injDetail: Morrow (reconditioning) is out for Friday's game against Golden State.

1630993.name: Anneli Maley
1630993.injDetail: Maley (coach's decision) is listed as out for Saturday's game against Minnesota.

1643437.name: Ashlon Jackson
1643437.injDetail: Jackson (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Friday's game against Golden State.

1641695.name: Ashten Prechtel
1641695.injDetail: Prechtel (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Friday's game in Connecticut.

203398.name: Brittney Griner
203398.injDetail: Griner (quadriceps) is out for Friday's game against the Valkyries.

1628279.name: Brittney Sykes
1628279.injDetail: Sykes (foot) will be re-evaluated in the coming weeks, according to WNBA reporter Kareem Copeland.

1642287.name: Cameron Brink
1642287.injDetail: Brink (ankle) will be re-evaluated in two weeks, John W. Davis of Long Beach Press-Telegram reports.

1643424.name: Costanza Verona
1643424.injDetail: Verona (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Friday's game against the Tempo.

1643488.name: Emma Cechova
1643488.injDetail: Cechova (knee) was diagnosed with a torn ACL in her right knee and will undergo surgery, Meghan L. Hall of USA Today reports. She will miss the remainder of the season.

1629496.name: Ezi Magbegor
1629496.injDetail: Magbegor (face) has been ruled out for Sunday's game against the Mystics.

1628931.name: Gabby Williams
1628931.injDetail: Williams (back) is listed as out for Friday's game versus Connecticut.

1641650.name: Haley Jones
1641650.injDetail: Jones (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Friday's game against the Tempo.

1643527.name: Jordan Harrison
1643527.injDetail: Harrison (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against Atlanta.

1643505.name: Jovana Nogic
1643505.injDetail: Nogic (not injury related) intends to play professionally in Russia and won't return to Phoenix this season, Aya Abdeen of TheIXSports.com reports.

1628276.name: Kelsey Plum
1628276.injDetail: Plum has suffered a lower left leg injury and will be re-evaluated in four weeks, Mitchell Hansen of CanisHoopus.com reports.

1643445.name: Kiki Rice
1643445.injDetail: Rice (ankle) remains sidelined by a Grade 3 left ankle sprain, according to WNBA reporter Kareem Copeland.

1630142.name: Leonie Fiebich
1630142.injDetail: Fiebich (foot) is out for Saturday game against the Lynx.

1642820.name: Liatu King
1642820.injDetail: King (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against the Liberty.

1630469.name: Marine Fauthoux
1630469.injDetail: Fauthoux (coach's decision) is listed as out for Saturday's game against Minnesota.

1630471.name: Maya Caldwell
1630471.injDetail: Caldwell (migraine) exited Saturday's 90-85 win over the Liberty and did not return, finishing with five points (2-3 FG, 1-2 FT), one rebound and one steal in seven minutes.

1631039.name: Miela Sowah
1631039.injDetail: Sowah (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Friday's game against the Sun.

1631055.name: Nyara Sabally
1631055.injDetail: Sabally (knee) is listed as questionable for Sunday's game against New York.

1643706.name: Ornella Bankole
1643706.injDetail: Bankole (coach's decision) is not listed on the injury report ahead of Sunday's game versus the Liberty.

1643487.name: Quionche Carter
1643487.injDetail: Carter (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against the Aces.

1642288.name: Rickea Jackson
1642288.injDetail: The Sky announced Tuesday that Jackson will miss the remainder of the season after suffering a torn ACL in her left knee during Sunday's 86-79 win over the Lynx.

1642790.name: Sania Feagin
1642790.injDetail: Feagin (knee) was diagnosed with a torn left ACL on Thursday and will miss the rest of the 2026 campaign, WNBA reporter Kareem Copeland reports.

1642809.name: Saniya Rivers
1642809.injDetail: Rivers (ankle) is expected to return to game action by the end of next week, Maggie Vanoni of Hearst reports.

1642782.name: Sarah Ashlee Barker
1642782.injDetail: Barker (not with team) is listed as out for Saturday's game against the Dream.

1643470.name: Shay Ciezki
1643470.injDetail: Ciezki (coach's decision) is listed as out for Saturday's game against the Aces.

203400.name: Skylar Diggins
203400.injDetail: Diggins (knee) is listed as out for Friday's game against the Sparks.

1642785.name: Sonia Citron
1642785.injDetail: Citron (knee) is listed as probable for Sunday's game against the Storm.

1643444.name: Ta'Niya Latson
1643444.injDetail: Latson (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against the Mercury.

1643473.name: Taina Mair
1643473.injDetail: Mair (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Sunday's game against the Mystics.

1627701.name: Temi Fagbenle
1627701.injDetail: Fagbenle (concussion) has been ruled out for Sunday's game against the Liberty.
